variants: Amer Sulaiman, who currently resides in Crowspire Reach, was born in Rowanmist Bay. After he graduated from Jovian Lakes College, he found his career path at Inkwell Harbor Printworks, where he applies his skills in the world of print. In the coastal town of Rowanmist Bay, Amer Sulaiman was born, later making Crowspire Reach his home. He pursued higher education at Jovian Lakes College, where he crafted his artistic abilities. Presently, Amer is employed at Inkwell Harbor Printworks, contributing meaningfully to the printing industry. For his outstanding achievements, he has received the Jasmine Loom Emblem, recognizing his dedication and skill. His career is a testament to the values of perseverance and creativity.
